name: send_document
description: Send a document or file to a chat. Agents can deliver PDFs, spreadsheets, and other files to users.

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target chat. Can be a user ID, group ID, or channel ID.

parameters.name: document
parameters.description: File to send. Can be a file ID (string), a URL to a file, or binary file contents.

parameters.name: thumbnail
parameters.description: Optional. Thumbnail of the file to be sent. Can be a file ID or URL.

parameters.name: caption
parameters.description: Document caption. Up to 1024 characters. May contain HTML or Markdown formatting.

parameters.name: reply_to_message_id
parameters.description: If set, the document will be sent as a reply to the specified message ID.
